chunks.title: Longing for God's Dwelling
chunks.reason: The psalmist expresses deep longing for the temple and declares the blessedness of those who dwell there.

chunks.title: Strength in the Journey to Zion
chunks.reason: Describes the spiritual strength of pilgrims traveling through difficult valleys to appear before God.

chunks.title: Prayer and Preference for the Temple
chunks.reason: A prayer for God to hear and look upon His anointed, followed by a declaration that being in God's courts is better than anywhere else.

chunks.title: God as Sun and Shield
chunks.reason: Concludes with a theological statement about God's provision for the blameless and a final blessing on those who trust in Him.
